stat.air-capacity.title: Air capacity
stat.air-leak.title: Air leak
universe.derelict-extant-part-1-playtest: Incomplete accepted content from the first supervised dual-agent run.
location.cryopod.title: Cryopod
location.cryopod.description: Darkness presses against the narrow pressure shell.
action.open-your-eyes.title: Open Your Eyes
action.open-your-eyes.description: Force your eyes open against the cold.
action.open-your-eyes.success: Cold metal presses against your back. Frost webs a window inches from your face while a pump knocks twice beneath you, misses its third stroke, and starts again.
action.open-your-eyes.failure: Your eyelids lift briefly. Cold and darkness close over the glimpse.
event.cryopod.memory: You cannot remember your name, this vessel, or entering the pod. The air tastes stale and faintly metallic.
event.cryopod.choices: A recessed manual release sits below your left shoulder. The failed lid actuator could also be forced until its housing breaks.
action.wipe-frost-from-window.title: Wipe the Frost
action.wipe-frost-from-window.descriptio: Clear a patch of the pod window with your hand.
action.wipe-frost-from-window.success: The frost smears beneath your palm. Beyond the glass, loose cables hang over a dark compartment, and a strip of stars shows through a breach in the far wall.
action.wipe-frost-from-window.failure: The frost softens but will not clear. Only a few fixed points of light show through it.
action.inspect-status-lamp.title: Inspect the Status Lamp
action.inspect-status-lamp.description: Study the damaged indicator beside the window.
action.inspect-status-lamp.success: Three symbols cycle beneath cracked plastic: temperature failure, memory interface offline, lid actuator fault. The last symbol remains lit longer than the others.
action.inspect-status-lamp.failure: The lamp gutters while you watch. Its fractured symbols do not hold long enough to read.
action.listen-to-pod-machinery.title: Listen to the Machinery
action.listen-to-pod-machinery.descripti: Hold still and separate the pod's sounds from the vessel around it.
action.listen-to-pod-machinery.success: A pump knocks twice, pauses, then fails to catch on the third stroke. Behind it, metal ticks slowly as the hull loses heat.
action.listen-to-pod-machinery.failure: Your breathing fills the shell. The machinery beneath it remains uneven and indistinct.
action.feel-along-lid-seam.title: Search the Lid Seam
action.feel-along-lid-seam.description: Trace the edge of the lid for a latch or manual release.
action.feel-along-lid-seam.success: Your fingers find a recessed lever below your left shoulder. Its cover is missing, and frozen lubricant binds the exposed hinge.
action.feel-along-lid-seam.failure: The seam is numbingly cold. Your fingers slip before they find purchase.
location.cryobay.title: Cryobay
location.cryobay.description: Dead cryopods line a compartment open to the star field beyond a fractured outer wall.
action.force-pod-lid.title: Force the Pod Lid
action.force-pod-lid.description: Brace against the shell and drive the failed lid actuator open.
action.force-pod-lid.success: The actuator chatters, catches, and tears free with a metal snap. The lid rises far enough to crawl beneath, spilling cold vapor across the deck.
action.force-pod-lid.failure: The lid lifts a finger's width before the actuator slips. Frost closes over the gap.
action.work-manual-release.title: Work the Manual Release
action.work-manual-release.description: Rock the exposed lever until the frozen hinge gives.
action.work-manual-release.success: The lubricant fractures like thin glass. The lever drops, bolts withdraw around the shell, and the lid rises on exhausted springs.
action.work-manual-release.failure: The lever moves once, then freezes against its housing. The lid bolts remain seated.
item.space-suit.title: Spacesuit
item.space-suit.description: A sealed utility suit with an integral air system.
item.air-canister.title: Air Canister
item.air-canister.description: A compact replacement canister for the suit recycler.
item.water-pouch.title: Water Pouch
item.water-pouch.description: A small sealed pouch of drinking water.
item.food-ration.title: Food Ration
item.food-ration.description: A dense emergency ration in foil packaging.
action.open-emergency-locker.title: Open the Emergency Locker
action.open-emergency-locker.description: Force open the marked locker beside the airlock.
action.open-emergency-locker.success: The warped door yields. A folded spacesuit hangs inside beside two air canisters, one water pouch, and a single foil ration.
action.open-emergency-locker.failure: The locker door flexes against its bent frame but does not release.
action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.title: Inspect the Airlock
action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.descripti: Check the only intact exit and its pressure controls.
action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.success: The inner door still seals. Its panel shows vacuum beyond and warns that opening it will vent the cryobay through damaged equalization valves.
action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.failure: The pressure display flickers between unreadable values. The inner door remains locked in its frame.
action.watch-the-stars.title: Watch the Stars
action.watch-the-stars.description: Study the strip of star field visible through the fractured outer wall.
action.watch-the-stars.success: The stars drift with the vessel, stop, then retrace several seconds of motion before continuing. Loose frost on the glass does not move with them.
action.watch-the-stars.failure: Reflections from the failing status lights cross the glass. The stars remain difficult to track.
action.check-cryobay-console.title: Check the Cryobay Console
action.check-cryobay-console.description: Wake the room console and review the remaining ship systems.
action.check-cryobay-console.success: Most compartments return no signal. A main intersection and the captain's deck still answer, but the route begins beyond the airlock.
action.check-cryobay-console.failure: The console wakes to a field of dead compartment indicators, then loses power.
resource.air-capacity.title: Suit Air
resource.air-capacity.description: Breathable air remaining in the spacesuit system.
action.inspect-other-cryopods.title: Inspect the Other Cryopods
action.inspect-other-cryopods.descriptio: Check the remaining pods for occupants, records, or usable equipment.
action.inspect-other-cryopods.success: The other lids stand open. Their restraints retain human-shaped pressure marks, but the shells contain only brittle sensor leads and a film of gray dust.
action.inspect-other-cryopods.failure: Clouded windows and dead displays conceal whatever remains inside the other pods.
action.put-on-space-suit.title: Put On the Spacesuit
action.put-on-space-suit.description: Seal the utility suit and start its air system.
action.put-on-space-suit.success: The neck ring locks after two attempts. The suit stiffens under pressure, and its air gauge climbs to full.
action.put-on-space-suit.failure: The neck seal folds beneath the locking ring. The suit refuses to pressurize.
action.open-cryobay-airlock.title: Open the Airlock
action.open-cryobay-airlock.description: Cycle the inner door and expose the cryobay to vacuum.
action.open-cryobay-airlock.success: The damaged valves open together. Vapor tears across the deck, the room falls silent, and the airlock indicator turns green.
action.open-cryobay-airlock.failure: The valves shudder without opening. The inner door remains sealed.
location.main-intersection.title: Main Intersection
location.main-intersection.description: Four unlit corridors meet beneath a cracked navigation panel. Loose wiring hangs motionless in the vacuum.
location.cryobay.exhausted: There is nothing more to learn here. The only way forward is through the airlock.
location.main-intersection.exhausted: The junction offers no more answers. The command stripe toward the captain's deck is the only useful lead.
location.captain-quarters.exhausted: The terminal has yielded what it can. Restoring communications is the remaining task.
effect.suit-air-loss.title: Suit air consumption
action.replace-air-canister.title: Replace an Air Canister
action.replace-air-canister.description: Consume one spare canister to restore 50 suit air. The gauge must be half empty or lower.
action.replace-air-canister.success: The empty canister releases with a hard twist. The replacement seats, and the suit gauge climbs by half its full range.
action.replace-air-canister.failure: The coupling refuses to unlock. No air transfers from the spare canister.
action.cross-cryobay-airlock.title: Cross the Airlock
action.cross-cryobay-airlock.description: Leave the vented cryobay and spend suit air crossing into the dark junction.
action.cross-cryobay-airlock.success: Your boots lock and release across the threshold. Ten points vanish from the air gauge before you reach the main intersection.
action.cross-cryobay-airlock.failure: The outer hatch binds before you clear it. You retreat into the cryobay with the passage still blocked.
action.read-junction-map.title: Read the Junction Map
action.read-junction-map.description: Spend suit air tracing the surviving labels on the navigation panel.
action.read-junction-map.success: Emergency power reveals four routes: engineering, crew quarters, communications, and the captain's deck. Several intermediate compartments no longer answer.
action.read-junction-map.failure: The panel dies before its route labels stabilize.
action.trace-captain-deck-route.title: Trace the Captain's Route
action.trace-captain-deck-route.descript: Follow physical deck markings toward the captain's section while suit air falls.
action.trace-captain-deck-route.success: A faded command stripe turns into the starboard corridor. You need answers, signs of life, and a working transmitter; the captain's deck is the best chance of finding all three.
action.trace-captain-deck-route.failure: Broken wall panels interrupt the command stripe before its direction becomes clear.
action.inspect-intersection-damage.title: Inspect the Hull Damage
action.inspect-intersection-damage.descr: Use suit air checking the junction for the cause and direction of the breach.
action.inspect-intersection-damage.succe: The wall plates bend outward, away from the vessel's center. A narrow impact groove continues toward communications.
action.inspect-intersection-damage.failu: Layers of torn insulation conceal the damage beneath the outer plating.
location.captain-quarters.title: Captain's Quarters
location.captain-quarters.description: A sealed command cabin holds a dark terminal and an emergency communications console.
action.follow-captain-route.title: Follow the Captain's Route
action.follow-captain-route.description: Follow the command stripe through the damaged starboard corridor.
action.follow-captain-route.success: You pull through a collapsed hatch and seal the captain's cabin behind you. A command terminal and emergency transmitter still show standby lights.
action.follow-captain-route.failure: A collapsed frame blocks the command stripe before you can reach the captain's door.
action.review-captains-terminal.title: Review the Captain's Terminal
action.review-captains-terminal.descript: Recover the last readable command entries.
action.review-captains-terminal.success: The final entries record clocks disagreeing across the vessel. Consecutive timestamps decrease.
action.review-captains-terminal.failure: The terminal exposes only corrupted timestamps and incomplete reports.
action.inspect-communications-console.de: Test the emergency transmitter and align its surviving antenna.
action.inspect-communications-console.su: The transmitter accepts power after a manual restart. Its antenna reports a narrow path through the wreckage.
action.inspect-communications-console.fa: The transmitter resets each time the antenna begins to align.
action.send-distress-beacon.title: Send a Distress Beacon
action.send-distress-beacon.description: Commit the remaining suit air and transmitter power to an emergency broadcast.
action.send-distress-beacon.success: The beacon clears the hull. The acknowledgement field remains empty while the receiver repeats the same carrier pattern back to you.
action.send-distress-beacon.failure: The antenna loses alignment before the transmission clears the wreck.
